title: Fast commands
description: Allows you to quickly execute some commands
body:
- Press **F6** to open the **_Fast commands_** menu. There are switches for **gamemode, time, weather, and the kill command.** 
- By pressing **U**, you can switch the **gamemode from creative to survival and vice versa.** 
- _This menu will only work with level 4 permissions._

**It's better to install [Night vision and invisibility toggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/night_vision_toggle), but it's optional.**

**WARNING:** _the mod does not work or works incorrectly with Optifine_
